items.name: Golden Lion Pin
items.description:
Golden Lion Pin

More UGC & Clothing: https://www.roblox.com/groups/14086029/Formalitat-Formal-Attire#!/store - Don't forget to join!

Unleash your regal side with the Limited Edition Golden Lion Pin by Formalitat! This exquisite pin is a masterful blend of elegance and strength, meticulously crafted to capture the majestic essence of a lion. Whether you’re dressing up for a special occasion or adding a touch of grandeur to your everyday attire, the Golden Lion Pin will make a statement that roars with sophistication.

MARCHÉE - Beige Wide Leg Pleated Trousers with Extended Leather Belt Detail
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.

**DISCLAIMER: Due to the wide variety of avatar bodies, complex poses, and the baggy silhouettes of our designs, slight visual glitches or artifacts may occur. Please try before purchase.
